if.test: status != null and status != '' and status != '全部'
eventType != null and eventType != '' and eventType != '全部'

where.if: AND ( IFNULL(event_type,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eventType}, '%') OR IFNULL(event,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eventType}, '%') )
AND ( IFNULL(order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderId}, '%') OR IFNULL(order_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderId}, '%') )
AND ( IFNULL(order_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR IFNULL(order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR IFNULL(error_message,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') )
AND ( IFNULL(pixel_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%') OR IFNULL(order_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%') OR IFNULL(order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('成功','success') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('失败','failed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('待处理','pending') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending FROM callback_logs
